label: MCP Tool
description: Invoke an MCP (Model Context Protocol) tool through the platform's mcp-proxy. Auth runs as the user (OBO federation for AWS/Azure).

settings.name: toolServer
settings.label: MCP server
settings.description: Server identifier (e.g. openagentic_azure, openagentic_aws). Hyphens are normalized to underscores; trailing _mcp is stripped. web_search/web_news_search auto-route to openagentic_web.

settings.name: serverName
settings.label: Server name (legacy alias)
settings.description: Deprecated — falls back to this when toolServer is unset.

settings.name: arguments
settings.label: Tool arguments
settings.description: Object passed verbatim as the tool's arguments. String values are template-interpolated.

ai.shortDescription: Invoke an MCP tool via mcp-proxy.
ai.whenToUse: When you need to call out to an MCP-exposed tool (Azure / AWS / k8s / web_search / loki / etc.) on behalf of the user.
ai.examplePrompt: list AWS S3 buckets via the openagentic_aws MCP server
ai.promptHints: Reference the result with {{steps.<id>.content}} (string-joined text blocks).
